name: closing-distance
prompt: Medium wide shot. Woman in navy uniform moving closer to dark-haired man. She RIGHT of center, he LEFT of center. Distance narrowing between them. Cool blue-white room interior. Couch visible behind. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: mentioning-sera
prompt: Medium shot. Woman with dark hair swept back, navy uniform. Speaking, calculating expression. Eyes sharp. Cool lighting from left. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Valeria
dialogue.text: I heard about your synergy partner. Kaine, isn't it?

name: his-challenge
prompt: Medium close-up. Dark-haired man, guarded expression, dark eyes hard. Dark suit with bare collar. Cool blue-white light from right, shadows on left of face. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Idris
dialogue.text: And they sent you to deliver that message.

name: her-truth
prompt: Close-up. Woman's face, dark hair swept back. Something honest showing beneath the confidence. Eyes softening slightly. Cool light, soft warm gradient behind. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
